title: Capacity & Saturation

panels.title: Node CPU Utilization

targets.expr: sum by (node) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{container!="",image!=""}[5m]) * on(namespace,pod) group_left(node) max by (namespace,pod,node) (kube_pod_info)) / clamp_min(sum by (node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="cpu"}), 1)

panels.description: CPU usage divided by allocatable CPU for each node.

panels.title: Node Memory Utilization

targets.expr: sum by (node) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{container!="",image!=""} * on(namespace,pod) group_left(node) max by (namespace,pod,node) (kube_pod_info)) / clamp_min(sum by (node) (kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory"}), 1)

panels.description: Memory working set divided by allocatable memory for each node.

panels.title: CPU Request Ratio
panels.description: Requested CPU as a share of allocatable CPU.

panels.title: Memory Request Ratio
panels.description: Requested memory as a share of allocatable memory.

panels.title: CPU Limit Overcommit
panels.description: CPU limits divided by allocatable CPU.

panels.title: Memory Limit Overcommit
panels.description: Memory limits divided by allocatable memory.

panels.title: Top Namespaces by CPU
panels.description: Highest namespace CPU consumers in the selected namespace scope.

panels.title: Top Namespaces by Memory
panels.description: Highest namespace memory consumers in the selected namespace scope.

panels.title: Top Workloads by CPU
panels.description: Highest workload CPU consumers in the selected namespace scope.

panels.title: Top Workloads by Memory
panels.description: Highest workload memory consumers in the selected namespace scope.

panels.title: Containers Without Requests
panels.description: Containers missing CPU or memory requests.

panels.title: Containers Approaching Limits
panels.description: Containers using more than 80% of configured memory limits.

panels.title: Unschedulable Pods
panels.description: Pods marked unschedulable by the scheduler.

panels.title: PVC Usage and Remaining Capacity
panels.description: PVC usage ratio and remaining bytes for selected namespaces.

panels.title: Node Pressure Conditions
panels.description: Nodes reporting disk, memory, or PID pressure.

description: Golden Path capacity and saturation dashboard for cluster request ratios, headroom, node utilization, top consumers, and scheduling pressure.
